entry.title: Re: Introducing the Background Processing Framework
entry.content:
Hi @Molle,

just to make sure it get it right: I create the process-factory and a process during the modify-phase (e.g. within an action). Those are local variables though, meaning i must somehow pass the reference to my process object to the save sequence.

I currently use a static attribute for that to pass the object so i can call it later within the save sequence.

What's the solution for that? Having to pass the reference to the process object, i could also simply pass any other object with data to the save sequence and use a function ON UPDATE task instead of using the bgPF.

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Instance Deleted from Trial althoug...
entry.content:
A new movement from SAP for Trial accounts of Integration Suite:

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/integration-suite?commercialModel=free&tab=service_plan&region=all

Evaluate the feature scope (not suitable for productive usage). Processing large messages (>=1 MB) isn’t supported. SAP enforces quotas on resource usage of SAP Integration Suite. Your trial account for SAP Integration Suite is limited to 30 days. After this time, your instance and all your content are deleted. See: SAP Note 2903776. For region availability of Graph, see SAP Note 3338820.

entry.title: Error while creating users in manage workforce app
entry.content: Error "Grouping BPEE has external number assignment. Please enter a valid number" in s/4hana cloud while creating users in manage workforce app.

entry.title: Re: loginmethod PWD and SSO in SCIM API version 2
entry.content:
Hello

There's a note on this you might want to check: https://me.sap.com/notes/3437692/E

I was able to do this with some instances but I'm having an issue with a newer instance where the loginmethod field is not retrieved from the API call so despite i'm using the proper mapping the field is not shown even if I test with a manual API call vis postman

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Trigger START-OF-SELECTION on clicking custom refresh...
entry.content:
To SUBMIT the program again with all same parameters:

  1. CALL FUNCTION 'RS_REFRESH_FROM_SELECTOPTIONS' ... " to retrieve the values of all parameters in one call in format of below WITH SELECTION-TABLE
  2. SUBMIT ... WITH SELECTION-TABLE ... AND RETURN. " to pass all the parameter values in one call

Search the official ABAP documentation and the Web for more details.

entry.title: Re: Creating P.R with reference to reservation
entry.content: HOW MRP does this ? i need the Dept to create automatic P.R if the reservation QTYs not available ,not through P.R from MRP Controller

entry.title: Re: Can I update Child Entity fields as a side effect of a Parent's Entity field of a ABAP RAP app?
entry.content: What is your definition of behavior? So how must the side effect be specified so that your code is executed?

entry.title: Re: how different Data flows,Transformation flows and Rep...
entry.content: Thank you, So, I wouldn't use Data flows unless if I have a requirement to use Python Script transformation, right? I can get my most of the requirements done with Replication flows and Transformation flows combination as shown in the Picture.

entry.title: Re: iOS 15.8.2 Appgyver conflict.
entry.content:
Hi

@Dan_Wroblewski 
@MaiaraEllwanger 
@marihirvi 

 

Any feedback or recommendations on what I can do to solve this problem?

entry.title: SAP GUI 32bit compatibility with Windows 11
entry.content:
Is SAP GUI 32bit compatible with Windows 11?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI 32bit compatibility with Windows 11
entry.content:
Hello,

You can find the answer for this through:

66971 - Supported SAP GUI platforms

3218166 - SAP GUI for Windows: Functional differences of the 64bit version compared to the 32bit version

Especially the statement:

"you can use the standard SAP GUI versions for Windows 32-bit operating systems on 64-bit platforms (as long as your system has the SAP GUI, operating system, and hardware versions specified in the list above)." from 66971.

So the short answer is that there is no problem in using 32bit SAP GUI in Windows 11.

I'm glad to assist.

entry.title: Re: ONB processes are not archived
entry.content:
Hi sshah1!

I need the same thing, I want to remove expired or cancelled from the panel. I can't get it to go through.

entry.title: Re: SEN: Error message "Call was rejected by callee"

So I´m working on inventory for the embedded EWM in S/4 public cloud solution and looking for a Fiori app available for standard solution.

entry.title: Fiori element
entry.content:

In the app part I have a tile containing sections in the Object Page
one of the sections is a table with type : "ResponsiveTable"
I have more then 8 columns.

Is it possible to make the "Show More Feature in List Report" by default?

entry.title: Re: Aggregate usage data in your production system with SUSG transaction

we have usage data in SUSG from 2019 until now. I would like to create a snapshot for the last 13 month, but cannot enter a date range for snapshot creation.

Is there a way to do this?

Thanks and regards
Jens

entry.title: Bank Communication with S4HANA Cloud for Small & Medium businesses
entry.content:
Hi

For a french customer, we have to build a communication between S4HANA Cloud and its banks: Payment files and bank statements

MBC could be the solution but unfortunately, EBICS 3 protocol is still not available. Moreover, MBC si represents a big budget for small companies, only for connecting their SAP and banks.

Does someone has experienced alternative solutions ? Do some solution exist on the SAP Store?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/PI_CC_CREATE result to be one Physical Inventor...
entry.content: <deleted>

entry.title: Re: Creating P.R with reference to reservation
entry.content:
Hello  @2831990 

A reservation is a requirement. If it is not covered by the current stock, then MRP can create PR (purchase requisition) to cover the requirement (reservation). I don't think there is any other way to create a purchase requisition from a reservation.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Long text not displayed MDG
entry.content:
Hello.

I have a requirement to update the message AM 229 with long text... Which I did, but the text is not displayed on the MDG Web UI screen. There should be a hyperlink "Display help" but there is no such a thing.

Thank you.

entry.title: Altdatenübernahme für Anlagen in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: Wir übernehmen gerade für die Anlagenbuchhaltung Daten aus dem Altsystem. Es handelt sich hierbei um eine unterjährige Anlagenmigration. Wie geht man hier mit Anlagen um die bereits im aktuellen Geschäftsjahr angeschafft wurden. Ich habe nur eine einzige Anlage die im neuen Geschäftsjahr übernommen werden muss. Die anderen Anlagen stammen alle aus dem alten Geschäftsjahr 2023. Habt ihr hier Tipps?

entry.title: Re: Breaking Down Barriers: Hear from Chelcie Scott How She Broke into Tech with the Help of SAP
entry.content: Wow, what an inspiring story! Thanks a lot for sharing Anne!

entry.title: Re: Multiple Delta - Delta with different selection on 0F...
entry.content:
I'm not sure I understand the purpose of the question.

ODP supports multi initializations with different filters, as it merges the queues of the various filters. In case you want to see if your specific scenario works, why not just do some tests in a test environment?

If you have two DTP-s:

  • DTP A with filter on COMP_CODE = 1000
  • DTP B with filter on COMP_CODE = 2000

then the system will get the corresponding data for the specific DTP you start. If you run A you will get only data for 1000. If your un B you will get only data for 2000.

The delta queue will hold data for both filters.

entry.title: Re: SEN: Error message "Call was rejected by callee"
entry.content: When I double-click on the generated PDF or Word format documents I get this error message "{"message_error_code":"UE_FILE_DOES_NOT_EXIST","details":"E5376C6F-06031316","message":"there is no file (content,project,PR_3166000AA9E379C,wi.pdf)","status":404}"

entry.title: Re: Multiple Delta - Delta with different selection on 0F...
entry.content:
Hello Roland,

Thanks for the reply. 

The example that I gave is the one that we have tested and how the data is looking in ODQMON v/s what is loaded.

Your example - The filters are working fine i.e. DTP with 1000 gets 1000 data and DTP with 2000 gets 2000 data. Point is when we tested the delta, the number of records in ODQMON and in BW is not matching.

As seen in the below example the final delta load for 1000 got 30 records in BW as per the filter. We were expecting 70 records to be loaded in BW , as when we triggered delta for 2000 it had 40 records for 1000 in ODQMON which were not loaded in BW as it had filter for 2000. 

SelectionINTI/DELTAODQMONBWComments
1000INIT without Data Transfer  First INIT load
1000Delta505050 Records for 1000
2000INIT without Data Transfer  Second INIT load
2000Delta1006040 Records for 1000 not loaded in BW
60 records for 2000 loaded in BW
1000Delta403030 records for 1000 loaded in BW 10 records for 2000 not loaded in BW.
For  1000 we were expecting 70 (40+30) records as 40 were in ODQMON when delta was triggered for 2000

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Welcome @olga-strijewski! There are so many things to check out here in SAP Community like the community events: https://community.sap.com/t5/events/ct-p/events, the topic pages https://pages.community.sap.com/topics, and the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/all-sap-community-blogs/ct-p/all-blogs - a lot of content to consume! I hope this helps you to start here!

entry.title: Creation of product master for retail system via Soap service is recommended?
entry.content:
Hello,

We working for one of our client on transformation from ECC to S4 Hana Private Cloud(On-premise)

Here, I need create Article Master or Product master (Retail System) via API's.

I have checked with the ODATA V2 and ODATA V4 API's and understood that we cannot use both the services for Retail Maintenance which is written in the respective API page.

Now i am looking for SOAP service and found the following API "Overview | Product Master - Replicate from Client to SAP S/4HANA | SAP Business Accelerator Hub". 

Please any let me know whether this SOAP service can be used for Retail System or not to create article master?

 

Regards,

Sunil

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello @KPramod there are some location groups in India here in SAP Community, which you can find here. These are to connect local people - maybe you want to join one of these. There are also oftentimes events like SAP Inside Track - the next one is scheduled in Bangalore: https://community.sap.com/t5/bengaluru-discussions/announcing-sap-inside-track-bengaluru-6th-july-2024/m-p/13718893 - check it out!

entry.title: Re: Not able to view PS Project from Item
entry.content: You have a connection problem from PPM to ERP.  You'll need a basis person to help with the connection settings in SPRO.

entry.title: Re: How to search for only one property in Object Table o...
entry.content:
Hello @Jitendra_Kansal, Thanks for the above approach. It worked but when i am adding additional query it did not working as earlier. So basically I get the customers based on the product associated with the customers and after that i search the customer name, so initially for empty search string it is working fine. it only fetch those customer which are equal to the given productId. But when i start searching for name it search from all the data list instead of those customer that are equal to the productId only.

  let pageClientData =context.binding;
    let productId = pageClientData.productId;

    // Simple value assignment.
    let search = context.searchString;
    let qoB = context.dataQueryBuilder();

  if (!search) {
        let productFilter = qoB.filterTerm(`ProductId eq '${productId}'`);
       
        qoB.filter(productFilter);
        
  }
    console.log("qoB",qoB);
    if(search && search != ''){
        let username = qoB.filterTerm(`substringof(tolower('${search}'),tolower(Name))`);
        let productFilterTest = qoB.filterTerm(`ProductId eq '${productId}'`);

        qob.filter().and(productFilterTest,username);

    }
    return qoB;

entry.title: Re: Edit Calculation not enabled in sap sac story created...
entry.content:
Dear @Chanti,

maybe the calculation was created as a calculated column?
In this case it's possible to edit the calculation via the Formula Bar.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Optimize your digital factory with SAP Signavio Process Intelligence Value Accelerators for SAP DM
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce the latest Value Accelerator release for SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, for SAP Digital Manufacturing. This Accelerator provides customers with greater visibility and transparency into their end-to-end manufacturing processes, right down to a granular event level.

Focusing meticulously on Shop-Floor-Control (SFC), assembly events and production events, the Accelerator reveals metrics around rework and yield rates – insights that are pivotal in identifying potential areas of cost savings throughout the manufacturing process.

In line with the core principle of SAP Value Accelerators – faster time-to-insight –the newly-minted Accelerator addresses standard process mining use cases, including cycle times and conformance checks, and allows for and deep dive investigations into the reasons for non-conformance.

 

Why Do You Need to use This Accelerator?

On top of the extensive offerings from SAP Digital Manufacturing, this Accelerator is designed to offer a comprehensive, end-to-end inspection of the manufacturing process, spotlighting latent issues and unveiling a sea of optimization opportunities. Customers can not only see the visualized manufacturing process, but also understand it, evaluate it, and identify areas for improvement.

Key features of this Accelerator include:

  • Access to domain knowledge: More than 50 years of business process transformation knowledge from SAP is incorporated in a ready-to-consume format with a single click.
  • Seamless integration: An easily-configured ODATA connection works together with the transformation logic to provide relevant information in pre-populated dashboards, ready for analysis.
  • Identifying bottlenecks: Visualization of end-to-end manufacturing processes means customers can see which process steps have the most rework, which elements take the longest time to complete, and more. Together, this helps calculate the potential savings of any process changes – without impacting production.

Below is a glimpse of the Overview Dashboard, which is now available for download from VAL (Value Accelerator Library) within SAP Signavio. To learn how to do it, check here. It covers the high level KPIs and deep dive widgets to uncover the root cause of process challenges, as well as hidden optimization potential.

Access SAP Signavio Process Intelligence Accelerator to know more

To find out more about this newly released accelerator, you can access SAP help portal. You can also access pre-built content within Value Accelerator Library and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence SAP Digital Manufacturing#

entry.title: Re: Warehouse management app for inventory overview
entry.content:
Hello @Lisa_Ahlgren 

I think you best bet would be either

  • Analyze Differences app or
  • Warehouse Monitor app.

The latter has an entire node to manage physical inventory documents, counts and differences:

The screenshot is from on-prem S/4HANA, but I hope it works pretty much the same in the public cloud.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: 🤖 Power to the Marketer: Omnichannel and AI Masterclass
entry.content:
The 2024 Power to the Marketer festival is a year-long celebration of the innovative work of marketers in connecting tradition with transformation, with in-person and online events taking place throughout 2024. 

Featuring a blend of physical workshops, Q&A sessions and panel discussions, Power to the Marketer gives you the chance to meet like-minded marketers and learn in-person by attending events in cities near you. 

Don’t Miss the Omnichannel & AI Masterclass

Highlighting the festival calendar is a special digital event, scheduled for June 12th-13th. Promising to be the cornerstone of Power to the Marketer, this two-day event will deliver an immersive online experience where digital leaders discuss how they’re driving true customer loyalty through AI-powered omnichannel personalization. Here’s a snapshot overview of what our Omnichannel & AI Masterclass has in store for you:

Masterclass Day 1 (12th June) 

  • SAP Emarsys Roadmap & AI Product announcements 
  • Retail brand fireside chats 
  • Technology partner success stories 
  • Omnichannel excellence and execution strategy session 

Masterclass Day 2 (13th June) 

  • Consumer Products Industry Panel 
  • Retail brand fireside chats 
  • Technology partner success stories 

Make sure to register here!

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/PI_CC_CREATE result to be one Physical Inventor...
entry.content: Hi Juergen, this "Fld to limit WO size" works for PI WOCR quite OK. But the question is if the field is populated from the source to /SCWM/WHO_CREATE. These fields, which can be selected here are actually CHAR fields from /SCWM/ORDIM_O, but in case of physical inventory, there is no WT in play in the WO creation. Therefore the selected field must be populated "on-the-fly" in Badi /SCWM/EX_WHO_DSTGRP. But it works 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to skip inspection rule usage in EWM ?
entry.content:
Hi,

try to implement Badi /SCWM/EX_QM_INSP_RELEVANCE, with output cv_not_relevant = ABAP_TRUE.

Regards

Martin

entry.title: Re: Bank Reconciliation using SAP standard tempate in FIO...
entry.content:
Hi Edrilan

I am downloading the template from the SAP FIORI app "Manage Bank Statements" and am using it to update Bank statement and upload. In the template i cannot find the Assignment field, so am not understanding how to update. The template is having only the following fields.

Manual Transaction
External Transaction
Value Date
Amount
Acct Currency
Memo Line
Check Number
Payment Medium Ref.
Customer Ref No
Item Reference
Payment Amount
Payment Currency
Partner Name
Partner Bank Code
Partner Bank C/R
Partner IBAN
Partner SWIFT
Partner Bank Account
Customer
Supplier
G/L Account
Description

Can i insert the assignment field in this template and then upload?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: how to control variable offset range [Analysis for Microsoft Excel]
entry.content:
Hi Expert!

I'd like to know how to solution as below issue.

Now I'm setting SAP Hana - CDS View - BW Query - Analysis for Microsoft Excel.

the workbook is shown annual trends compare with target year and the last year.

Unfortunately Query recognized both range when i used range variable and offset function.

I'd like to workbook get data both range but shown just range variable range. please let me know solution.

add. the variable using prompt function too.

entry.title: Re: Name Format in SuccessFactors Employee Central
entry.content:
Hello, hope you are doing well,

I'm looking to do the same using preferred names. However, currently we use two different fields one preferred first name (preferred-name) and the second field preferred last name (custom-field). I'm looking how can I add the preferred last name part of the Formal Name. Is there a way to manage preferred last name? 

Thank you

Zulema

entry.title: Request to share the steps involved in exporting Web Services
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We have a scenario where “Web-Services” are getting wiped out post performing system refresh and we need to manually re-configure the web-services again to regain the functionality.

 

So, we request to kindly share the pre-steps that are involved in taking export of web-services; so that we can re-import the configuration settings / export post completion of refresh activities.

 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request to share the steps involved in exporting Web...
entry.content:
Hello,

It is only possible to export the Web Services ABAP runtime configurations (in SOAMANAGER, Logical Ports and Bindings, etc.) from system refresh scenarios by using the PCA tool. Refer to KBA 2219008 - ESI - How to use transaction STC01 (PCA tool) for Web Service configurations on how to do so.

To use this tool, it is necessary to obtain an SAP Landscape Virtualization Management enterprise edition license to use the relevant task (Export web service configuration). SAP LaMa 3.0 (Landscape Management) is the successor of SAP LVM 1.0. For more details please refer to SAP Note 1912110 - Install SAP Landscape Management Enterprise Edition License.

 

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'm Muthumayandi Yadava from Mumbai, India.

Kindly share your location and we may connect each other to know us.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @Muthumayandi_Yadava welcome! If you want to find people to connect with, please check out our location groups in India, which you can find here: https://community.sap.com/t5/asia-pacific/ct-p/asia-pacific

There is none for Mumbai, but there might be any other you want to join.

entry.title: Re: Comp mime type 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' instead ''
entry.content: I have fixed issue by myself, thanks for your supports..

entry.title: Re: Anyway within LMS to product list of Content Objects...
entry.content:
We had to build our own custom report to get that data - Kind of. Ours is an item report that shows MOBILE_READY. 

The report shows the status as:

  • NONE
  • Mobile_only
  • Both

Both means it is set up for both Mobile and Offline viewing.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @sveabecker ,

Thank you for sharing this information.

entry.title: Re: Can’t Miss Asset and Service Management Sessions at SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando
entry.content: Make sure to register and attend SAP Sapphire Virtual, which will feature live keynotes and programming each day and also includes SCM900v | Hear how business AI changes Asset Management in train travel for SBB.

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh - Topic Filtering - SAP S4/Hana
entry.content:
We have a SAP S4/Hana 2020 system that we are looking to utilize to publish standard business events to SAP Event Mesh. Is there the ability to publish additional properties of the business object event into the topic name hierarchy in order to be able to have more fine grained subscriptions on consumer queues in Event Mesh, or the ability to add additional properties into the event message header for filtering purposes (like business header level information related to the business object)?

For example, we have high volume scenarios where we have multiple consumer systems that will subscribe to the publishing of a particular SAP S4/Hana event via Integration Flows (e.g. PM Order, or Equipment). We want to optimize processing in such a way that consumer system APIs are only invoked for events relevant to them in order to reduce unnecessary noise (for example, different systems may wish to receive events only for particular Company Codes). Instead of doing the event filtering at an Integration Flow level or on the consumer systems themselves, it would be more optimal filtering at the event mesh / message broker level. 

Is this possible on SAP S4/Hana - Event Mesh in terms of publishing to a topic name hierarchy additional properties? It seems like Advanced Event Mesh has the ability to do wildcard filtering on topics - does standard Event Mesh also support this? Is there also the ability to add additional business data fields into the SAP S4/Hana event message using the Business Event Handling framework to reduce the amount of API call backs to retrieve the full business data (payload) for the event.

entry.title: Re: Tell us what guides you'd like to have GitHub enabled
entry.content:
Hi @DominikTylczyn ,

if guide owners enable the available feedback option is also a matter of capacity. And what I got as a key-takeaway from our CEI sessions with customers last year was: the longer it takes to process feedback, the less valuable it is for reporters who might struggle with something in a running project. That's why it's no use to simply activate it everywhere.

The comments feature is still pretty new, and colleagues here need some time to evaluate what it means for them to use it. I forwarded your post so that they see there's a demand.

So unfortunately, the only option that is currently available for you is this widget for anonymous feedback. Since it's anonymous, no one replies to your feedback (even if you leave an email address). 


Hope this helps for now - I expect that over the course of this year, more areas will offer one or the other feedback option, but I am neither aware of a roadmap (except for the open documentation initiative, which is my project), nor of a process to request "comments" for guides.

Kind regards, 👋
Jens

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud email campaign email opened but no link clicked, behavior triggers
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to setup an email campaign in SAP Marketing Cloud and I want to setup a follow-up email if a customer opened an email but did not click any links (after a period of time)

How would I go about this? Does the click through action, with the No branch, imply that the customer opened the email but did not click any links?

Kind Regards,

Felix

entry.title: Why the diff between index src in sap capm sapui5 app & general ui5 app generated separately.
entry.content:
I can see a difference between sapui5 resources in index.html (src="https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.123.1/resources/sap-ui-core.js") of sapui5 app generated in sap capm and sapui5 app generated separately (

src="resources/sap-ui-core.js").

 
I tried to replicate the sapui5 resource in sapui5 (generated in sap capm) as same as general sapui5 app but it is throwing error as NOT FOUND.
 
General SAPUI5 app Index.html : 

 

Index.html of SAPUI5 app inside SAP CAPM:

 

Error screenshot : 

 

 

@gregorw  @qmacro  @WouterLemaire     Do you have any idea ?

entry.title: Sales Order created via internet is not being shown in sales order OWL.
entry.content:
Sales Order are not available in the SAP ByDesign system. However, you are able to see the Sales Order in the Sales History of the respective Account and corresponding reports. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Correlating output of sp_spaceused procedure
entry.content:
Without any details I'm guessing the difference is related to oam pages which could be part of a reserved extent but not usable for table/index storage.

If you want to dig into the details I'd recommend you run select spaceusage(db_id(),object_id('<table_name>') and then reference these values as you step through the source code for sp_spaceused to understand its output.

entry.title: Re: Sales Order created via internet is not being shown i...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The Sales Order created is not being shown in the ByDesign sales order OWL as this sales order is created from internet and the system is not scoped for automatic confirmation of sales order.

You can refer to the "KBA 1840866 - You Are Not Able to Find your Sales Order created from your E-Shop in the ByD system" for resolving the issue. 

Thanks & Regards,

Arjun T H

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Setting permissions for all dimension members using Data Access Control in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Analytics Cloud Experts.
I have a public dimension in which I have enabled Data Access Control.

This dimension has 146 members (for now) but although there are quite a few users that only apply to one or several members, I have quite a few users that will be able to read all the members of the dimension.

I want to know if there is a way, having the Data Access Control option enabled, to not have to include the same 20 users in all members but to enable them somehow so that they can see them all.

Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh - Topic Filtering - SAP S4/Hana
entry.content: You can achieve wildcard filtering of topics in queue subscriptions.  You wouldn't be able to filter on properties as part of the topic without being able to generate custom events, which requires the event enablement add-on (we are also on 2020).  The standard events follow the best practice guidelines of topic schema, which wouldn't include any business specific data.

entry.title: Re: Wily Introscope offline no matter what :-(
entry.content:
Hello Vera,

MANY THANKS for letting me know to check the defaultTrace log files! This was the turn point in solving the problem!! Based on the error message, I found note 2352112 by myself on Friday and after taking a careful look at everything, Wily is now FINALLY detected as online in step 4! Thank you so much for helping me to solve this after such a long combat! The cause for the issue was anything but obvious...

entry.title: Re: Introducing the Background Processing Framework
entry.content:
Hi @mario_lenz, 

true, based on your description I currently don't see any better solution then yours. So yes, in your case, CALL FUNCTION... IN UPDATE TASK might work as well as using the bgPF (although the AIF integration - if needed - is likely much more work compared to using the bgPF). 

However, this is only the case since you are working OnPrem. In Cloud (with ABAP for Cloud Development), CALL FUNCTION... IN UPDATE TASK is not allowed. Plus, there are plans for an "exactly once in order" quality which - afaik - can not be (easily) achieved with IN UPDATE TASK.  

Plus, with the provided Unit Test functionality, writing unit tests is likely much easier then when using a direct function call (not sure if the Function module test environment supports IN UPDATE TASK)

entry.title: Re: Accelerate move to SAP Integration Suite with SAP Integration Suite Testing Service
entry.content:
Hi, 

where can I find more information on the SAP Integration Suite Testing offering or how do I need to get in contact with?

entry.title: Re: Aggregate usage data in your production system with SUSG transaction
entry.content:
Hi Jens,

this is possible after implementation of the SAP note https://me.sap.com/notes/3317852 

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Tell us what guides you'd like to have GitHub enabled
entry.content:

Anna

entry.title: BAPI for Asset Retirement
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I need to create a custom report for (partial) asset retirement (like transaction ABAVN).
I have fount the BAPI_ASSET_RETIREMENT_POST bapi, but it seems it doesn't have an option for acquisition:

Is there a way to choose Prior-year/From curr.-yr acquis. in that BAPI? Is there any other BAPI I could use?

Thank you.

Regards,
Dario

entry.title: Re: Does monProcessActivity CPUTime and monEngine CPUTime...
entry.content:
Generally speaking the monitoring of cpu resources (by itself) won't get you very far in your quest to optimize performance and identify any potential bottlenecks.

Missing indexes and outdated stats can lead to poor query plans which in turn leads to excessive IOs.  If those IOs are physical in nature then cpu usage will be negligible compared to the time required to complete the physical IOs (and hence the loooong time required to complete the associated query).

Poor and/or incorrect lock management can lead to excessive blocking (read: queries take a long time to complete) which in turn uses up (effectively) zero cpu resources.

When you do find cases of 'high cpu usage' you'll need a bit more info to determine if the issue is related to heavy logical IOs (eg, poor query plan), spinlock contention (configuration issue?), excessive compilation overhead (eg, large convoluted queries; disabled statement cache), 'normal' dataserver operations, etc.

--------------------

monEngine.CPUTime is a counter of total time the engine has been running and includes a summary of system cpu time, user/query cpu time, idle/spin cpu time, etc.

While it may be tempting to compare sum(monProcessActivity.CPUTime) with monEngine.UserCPUTime you need to keep in mind that a) monProcessActivity shows counters for current connections while b) monEngine counters are an accumulation of all system and user activity (past and present) since the ASE instance was started.  Sure, you could take periodic snapshots of monEngine(.UserCPUTime) and then compare the difference of these snapshots with monProcessActivity (keeping in mind monEngine counts will always be greater than or equal to sum(monProcessActivity) counts) but cpu comparisons (by itself) won't provide much help without knowing what was causing the cpu usage.

entry.title: Re: Warehouse management app for inventory overview
entry.content: Mentioned App "Analyze differences and Warehouse Monitor are the once I found, Thanks for your input @DominikTylczyn

entry.title: Is it possible to show/hide all the fields of a field group based on tab (field group) selection?
entry.content: We can toggle fields based on conditions on other fields or other logic in the features methods, instance or global. However, can we do the same based on the tab selection, so that only 1 field group is visible at a time?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Yes Key Users can create default app settings for filters, tables, a
entry.content:
Hi Jocelyn,

thanks for the great, detailed blog.

In really love working with the Fiori selection and layout views compared to the SAP GUI.

But what I deeply miss or just don't know:
Is there a possibility to save the expand level within a view? Right know I only see to possibility to selected a saved view with groups and than say "expand all". A one-click solution would be great.

Thanks in advance and best regards
Martin

entry.title: How to set entities via global JSON model
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am new to SAPUI5 and still learning.
I have this problem where the skills and proficiency values should come from the entities via a global JSON Model. I have tried everything and searched everywhere but it is not working.

I decided to put my global json model in COMPONENT.JS

 

sap.ui.define ([
 "sap/ui/core/UIComponent"
 "sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel"
], function (UIComponent, JSONModel) {
   return UI.Component.extend("namespace",{
   //define the global JSON model
   var oModel = new JSONModel();
   this.setModel(oModel, "globalModel");

  //Load data
  var oData = {
      skills: [
          {id: 1, skill: "JavaScript"},
          {id: 2, skill: "SAPUI5:}
  ]
  proficiencies: [
          {id: 1, level: "Beginner"},
          {id: 2, level: "Expert"}
  ]
};
 oModel.setData(oData)
}
});

 

In my mainview.xml

 

<VBox>
 <ComboBox items="{path: 'globalModel>/skills'}"
  placeholder="Select Skill">
  <core:Item key="{globalModel>id}" text="{globalName>skill}"/>
 </ComboBox>
 <ComboBox items="{path: 'globalModel>/proficiencies'}"
  placeholder="Select Proficiency">
  <core:Item kety="{globalModel>id}" text="{globalName>level}"/>
 </ComboBox>

 

In my controller.js

 

return Controller.extend("namespace"){
  onInit: function (){
  //Access Global
  var oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel("globalModel);
  console.log(oModel.getData());
 }
}

 

Appreciate you help!

entry.title: Start your SAP Signavio Process Insights adoption with the redesigned Starter e-learnings
entry.content:
Play the embedded video

Hello SAP Signavio community,

as mentioned in the video above, SAP Signavio Value Map team is excited to announce that we have redesigned all our Process Insights sessions from the SAP Signavio Adoption Starter series.

If you haven't yet signed up for the SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps, don't worry, we've got you covered! Get started with SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps here.

Direct link to the refreshed E-Learning sessions:

SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for IT experts
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Lead to Cash (Sales)
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Finance
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Source to Pay (Procurement)
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Acquire to Decommission (Plant Maintenance)
SAP Signavio Adoption Starter: Process Insights for Business - Plan to Fulfil (Manufacturing)

We will also continue with the live sessions (see the following blog post). The new schedule will be available in the next 2 weeks.

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "SAP Signavio | Business Process Transformation" topic).

Happy learning!

entry.title: Report to display list of WBS & AUC
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

Is there any report available by which I can display list of projects & WBS element with associated AUC no , AUC cost , AUC balance etc . 

Thanking you .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Additional Binding in Consumption.valueHelpDefinition annotation not working.
entry.content:
I want to filter the results of my Value Help coming from another CDS View based on certain values, for which I am using the following code:

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ qualifier: '', entity: { name: 'Z_ELEMENTS', element: 'ElementUuid' }, 
        distinctValues: true, enabled: '', 
        additionalBinding: [{localParameter: '', localElement: 'Board', localConstant: '', parameter: '', element: 'MetaBoard', 
        usage: #FILTER_AND_RESULT }], label: '', presentationVariantQualifier: '' }]

 

when I filter in the SQL console using the values and the join condition, it works fine, however, here the additional binding to filter does not work and gives me the whole unfiltered list, except in the case of using #FILTER, wherein in I get usually an empty result when used in Info View, and still the whole list when used in Projection Views.

 

I also do not under the role of 'enabled' property, because n selecting anything, the application stops working.

 

Thank You

entry.title: Archive FI_ACCOUNT How to check the accounts that are available to Archive
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to archive object FI_ACCOUNT. We are aware that we need to mark to deletion Fi Account, but our question is. Is there some report that indicate what accounts can be archived? In other words what accounts can be archived but are not marked to deletion?

 

Best Regards

 

João

entry.title: Re: How to set entities via global JSON model
entry.content:
sap.ui.define ([
 "sap/ui/core/UIComponent"
 "sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel"
], function (UIComponent, JSONModel) {
   return UI.Component.extend("namespace",{
   //define the global JSON model
   var oModel = new JSONModel();

  //Load data
  var oData = {
      skills: [
          {id: 1, skill: "JavaScript"},
          {id: 2, skill: "SAPUI5:}
  ]
  proficiencies: [
          {id: 1, level: "Beginner"},
          {id: 2, level: "Expert"}
  ]
};
 oModel.setData(oData);
this.setModel(oModel,"globalModel")
}
});

entry.title: Re: Change Record
entry.content: Is there a way to switch off the 'relevance' flag in the change Record ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh - Topic Filtering - SAP S4/Hana
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

Thanks for the feedback. Are you using standard Event Mesh for the wild-card filtering, or Advanced Event Mesh?

In terms of the topic schema / hierarchy / taxonomy, I came across this best practices guide for Advanced Event Mesh that describes adding properties into the topic taxonomy (https://help.pubsub.em.services.cloud.sap/Messaging/Topic-Architecture-Best-Practices.htm). I was exploring if this is possible for standard events originating from SAP S4/Hana, based on the best practices defined in this document.

entry.title: Re: Step Into the Future with the SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Modernization Webcast Series
entry.content: hi @teresasanchez9 , webacst 7 is postponed to Q3 or Q3 2024. The registration link for webcast 8 will be available in a few days. You should get notified of the update

entry.title: Re: IBP to Datasphere with mass extraction of key figure...
entry.content:
SAP Cloud integration for data services (CI-DS) is bundled with IBP application license. Along with IBP , you will also be provisioned with CI-DS tenant .

Check out this blog on integrating SAP Datasphere with SAP IBP .

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/integrating-sap-datasphere-with-sap-integrated-business-planning-using-sap/ba-p/13643214

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh - Topic Filtering - SAP S4/Hana
entry.content: Yes, we are using event mesh and I have ${namespace}/ce/sap/s4/beh/+/v1/* for a particular queue where the subscriber will receive all events with outbound bindings in S4.

entry.title: Re: How to set entities via global JSON model
entry.content: Hi junwu, i edited my post. I included the this.setModel(oModel,"globalModel") as I have forgotten it. Still not working for me.

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Business Objects 4.3 -- multiple environ...
entry.content:
Promoting content from a higher version of Business Objects to a lower one is not supported by SAP and it may not work at all.

We perform "side by side" upgrades.  By this I mean, we build new servers for the new version and migrate the content to the new servers for testing the upgrade version.  This leaves the old version as is for continued universe and report development.

You can migrate all of your content over to the upgraded servers once you are ready.

entry.title: Can not call Process Automation from Build Apps in preview (404)
entry.content:
SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Apps 

Hello,

I am trying to connect Build Apps with Process Automation. However I am facing some issues on destinations.

I have a free tier instances of Build Apps and Automation ( Free + Standard Instance) 

I have setup this destination as per the tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/codejam-07-connect-app-process.html

I have implemented this dummy flow 

And on call it generates me the error : 

Would anyone have a clue on what did I miss ? 

Knowing that I am only in preview.

Thank you so much 

@Dan_Wroblewski

entry.content:
No, unfortunately this RF feature is only in decentral scenario (whoever might know why...)

Regards

Martin

entry.title: BAPI for transaction F-20
entry.content:
I need a BAPI for transaction F-20 so I don't need to use a Batch Input. Does anyone know of one?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Incorrect DG Status in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi Ajit,

ok, if the field "product compliance" is set to "yes" and the business feature "Dangerous Goods in the Value Chain" is aktive, and your issue still persists, you might want to check your Sales Document Type. We are not supporting all Sales Document Types. Please check the following IMG table in addition:

IMG: Product Compliance --> Integration --> Specify Excluded Document Types for Integration

Please be aware, not all Sales Document Types (end-to end processes) are supported by the Dangerous Goods solution, therefore those are excluded.

Another issue could be that you might be testing with a Product from the Best Practice Content of SDS or PMA, with those you cannot test the DG functionality.

Best Regards,
Marianne Sigmund

entry.title: SAP Fiori Elements - Grid Table - Selection behaviour
entry.content:
Hi,

I have generated a Fiori Elements grid table display. In ui5 version 1.119.0 and above, the row selection to navigate to the object page seems to work only when you select the '>' icon in the end of the line item. 

In version 1.118.0 and lesser row selection was working like 'sap.ui.table.SelectionBehavior.Row'.

Is this no longer possible in Grid Table. I have generated a simple App to demonstrate this issue.

https://github.com/Udineshsap13/CAPDraftIssue/blob/master/CAPIssue/app/erpcapissue/webapp/manifest.json

Can you please let me know if there is some configuration in Manifest which I am missing.

Thanks,

Dinesh

entry.title: Re: Freight Settlement from TM module to CO-PA
entry.content:
Hello Team, I am looking for some help to validate if below is the accounting standard when posting FSD document from TM to ECC. Also, is it true that with use of ABD, there are 2 intermediate GL account i.e. GL accounts 150500000 and 159130001, the reason for asking it because when we post the invoice document less than the accrual amount (-ve value clearing), there is a balance under 150500000  is not getting cleared automatically. Our accounting team from the business is asking us if there is a need for such accounting posting with 2 intermediate accounts. I have searched all possible help file, SAP support portal and I didn't find SAP standards related to accounting with TM integration to ECC and invoice posting against the TM Freight PO.  

I am looking for expertise who can validate these accountings.

entry.title: Re: SAP Code Vulnerability Analyzer (CVA) - FAQs
entry.content:
Very useful blog post even after some years.

Could you please verify verify and in case confirm the material code for the CVA installed in the S/4HANA system. The article points to SKU 7019502 but it seems deprecated.

Thanks a lot in advance

entry.title: ACRONYMS IN THE GROUPS FOR TAXBLE EVENTS
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question about some acronyms in the descriptions of the groups for taxable envents in SAP Business ByDesign.

Within the business configuration > Chart of Accounts: Charts of Accounts, Financial Reporting Structures, Account Determination > Account Determination Groups > Tax > Groups for Taxable Events, I have a series of account determination groups and in some of them the acronyms appear in their descriptions: BA.

9031 - BA - Import Sales / Purchases Tax - Services

9070 - BA - Domestic Supply / Acquisitions - Down Payments

9080 - BA - Own Consumption

9090 - BA - Domestic Supply - Non-Taxpayers

Could anyone tell me what exactly they mean?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Downloading excel or pdf file on click of a custom button using RAP in BTP
entry.content: The virtual template gets updated after you click the hyperlink of the download file. It will call the virtual element calculation class one more time.

entry.title: Re: Copy Recipient from MB1A / MIGO to EWM Delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

as the field MSEG-WEMPF has no counterpart in LIPS, this value is not copied in standard to ERP outbound delivery (and further, it is not replicated to EWM, obviously).

So, the first task is to to get it into LIPS. Finally, during posting GI, this value has to be copied into MSEG again.

Please check the Note

358828 - Fields from MBxx missing in delivery and MM document

Regards

Martin

entry.title: Re: Integration between IBP and Databricks
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no direct integration available between IBP and Databricks at the moment in the current middlewares. But you can always leverage the CI-DS or SAP Cloud Integration Suite to push data from SAP IBP into AWS S3.

If you use the Cloud Integration Suite - you can push the data to an S3 Bucket using standard request/reply adapters. Part of this blog can provide you some ideas:-  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/writing-forecast-data-to-snowflake-from-sap-integrated-business-planning/ba-p/13622578 

Once data is on an S3 bucket you can move this to Databricks. On the Databricks side ,you can either Onboard the data or use the COPY INTO functionality. Both are described in: https://docs.databricks.com/en/ingestion/onboard-data.html

entry.title: Re: My experience at the SAP Inside Track Barcelona
entry.content: Excellent. Great event!

entry.title: Unleash Transformational Success with SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager!
entry.content:
Hello SAP Signavio community,

We are thrilled to introduce our brand-new e-learning course: "Introducing SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager​".

This course could be your first step into the world of process transformation management, guided by the SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager.

You'll gain insights into our product vision and capabilities, topped off with a concise product demo. It's your golden ticket to understanding and leveraging SAP Signavio Process Transformation Manager in all your transformation projects. Grab this fantastic opportunity and let's start transforming together!

Ready to dive in? Follow this link to start your journey. (Membership in SAP Enterprise Support Academy is required.)

If you are not yet signed up for the SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps, please join via the following link.

E-Learning "Introducing SAP Signavio ​ Process Transformation Manager​"

And remember, this is your first sneak peek into the product. Stay tuned for more to come.

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "SAP Signavio | Business Process Transformation" topic).

Happy learning!

entry.title: Re: How to set entities via global JSON model
entry.content: how your view is created at runtime? is it created by routing?

entry.title: Error in the posting sequence in the system-for material-60144883 Batch-LDP001350
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings!

We have created process order for quantity 42 CAS and and order is TECO inspection lot with 04 origin is created with quantity 42 CAS.

Please find below screenshots.

Two inspection lot generated for same batch see screenshot below with different UOM we have problem with CAS Lot.

While performing the UD we are getting the below error as we checked the qty 761,040 KG is available for batch in MMBE stock is in Quality inspection.

Could you please help to resolved this issue.

Thanks in advance for your support,

Best Regards,

Varad
